title: Thunderbirds March Played Live at the Birmingham Symphony Hall | Stand by for Action Concert
author: Gerry Anderson

detail.Title: Thunderbirds March Played Live at the Birmingham Symphony Hall | Stand by for Action Concert
detail.Description:
The famous Thunderbirds theme composed by Barry Gray and conducted live at the Birmingham Symphony Hall by Richard Harvey, as part of the Stand by for Action Gerry Anderson in Concert!

Enjoy the full concert here: https://shop.gerryanderson.com/pages/stand-by-for-action-gerry-anderson-in-concert-now-on-cd-blu-ray-dvd-and-more
